_publications._publicationTitle: High-resolution mouse subventricular zone stem-cell niche transcriptome reveals features of lineage, anatomy, and aging
_publications._context: First description of the CGD transgene (Cre recombinase + enhanced histone H2B-GFP + diphtheria toxin receptor under rat Nestin promoter/enhancer), which is the Cre driver component of this model.

_publications._publicationTitle: Stem-like cells drive NF1-associated MPNST functional heterogeneity and tumor progression
_publications._context: First and only description of the CGD-based NI model (Nf1f/f;Cdkn2a;CGD) for NF1 MPNST, alongside the NP model. BC and DRG cells from E13.5 embryos were recombined in vitro and injected orthotopically. Introduces the NI shorthand. No prior paper describes this model combination.

_publications._publicationTitle: Hydroxychloroquine prevents resistance to SHP2 inhibition in NF1-mutant cancers
_publications._context: Kinase enrichment proteomic analysis (MIB/MS) of NF1 MPNST tumors from the NI (Nf1flox/flox;Cdkn2a;CGD) GEMM treated with SHP099 and/or trametinib (PRIDE PXD035998). Also used for RNA-seq (GEO GSE283902).

basicInfo.description: Conditional knockout of Nf1 combined with loss of Cdkn2a (Ink4a/Arf), driven by the CGD transgene (Cre recombinase, enhanced histone 2B-GFP, and diphtheria toxin receptor under the rat Nestin promoter/enhancer; CGD first described in Xie et al. 2020 PNAS). Abbreviated 'NI' in the Parada lab. Equivalent to Nf1-/-;Ink4a/Arf-/-. Develops NF1-associated malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors (MPNSTs). First described in Sun et al. 2021 Cell Stem Cell; no prior paper describes this model.
